name: Love's Travel Stop #644
description: Full-service Love's travel stop at I-70 Exit 437 with diesel, a Carl's Jr, showers, and truck parking.

name: Travel Shoppe (Conoco)
description: Independent Conoco-branded truck stop at I-70 Exit 437 with diesel lanes, a restaurant/deli, showers, and overnight truck parking.

name: TA Limon (TravelCenters of America #228)
description: TravelCenters of America at I-70 Exit 359 with a Country Pride restaurant, Subway, showers, laundry, and a CAT scale.

name: Pilot Flying J Travel Center #621
description: Flying J travel plaza at I-70 Exit 359 in Limon with diesel, an on-site restaurant, and multiple showers.

name: Limon Port of Entry (Eastbound Weigh Station)
description: Colorado State Patrol port of entry and open truck scales on I-70 near Limon around mile marker 360, which trucks are required to cross.

name: CAT Scale at Love's #644
description: Certified CAT scale located at the Love's Travel Stop off I-70 Exit 437 in Burlington.

name: CAT Scale at TA Limon
description: Certified CAT scale located at the TA travel center off I-70 Exit 359 in Limon.

description: Full-service TA travel center at the I-70/I-270 interchange in Commerce City with fuel islands, showers, restaurants, a certified CAT scale and a truck-service shop.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Commerce City

name: Flying J Travel Center - Aurora
description: Pilot Flying J travel center on I-70 at the Chambers Road interchange in Aurora with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a drivers lounge and a CAT scale.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Commerce City
description: Commercial truck tire dealer in the Commerce City industrial area near the I-70/I-270 corridor offering commercial transportation tires and 24-hour roadside tire service.

name: Love's Travel Stop #300 - Bennett
description: Love's Travel Stop on I-70 at Exit 304 in Bennett at the far eastern edge of the Denver metro corridor, offering fuel, showers, food and truck parking.

name: Love's Travel Stop #517
description: Full-service Love's travel center at I-70 Exit 26 in Grand Junction with 24-hour diesel, showers, a CAT Scale, and truck and tire repair.

name: Pilot Travel Center #592
description: Pilot travel center at I-70 Exit 26 in Grand Junction with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a trucker lounge, and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #826
description: Love's travel center opened in 2023 at I-70 Exit 75 in Parachute with 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, and truck parking.

name: Loco Travel Stop 17
description: Independent travel stop at I-70 Exit 19 in Fruita with diesel lanes, truck parking, laundry, and a restaurant.

name: Kum & Go (Rifle)
description: Fuel and convenience travel stop at I-70 Exit 90 in Rifle with 24-hour diesel, a paved lighted lot, and a deli.

name: Loma Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: Colorado State Patrol commercial-vehicle port of entry and weigh station on eastbound I-70 near Exit 15, about four miles west of Fruita toward the Utah line.

name: Grand Junction Truck & Car Wash
description: Self-service 6-bay wash on the I-70 Business Loop in Grand Junction that handles semi tractor-trailers, buses, and rigs.
